security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src * asset: data: blob:; media-src * asset: data: blob:; connect-src 'self' ipc: tauri: http://ipc.localhost https: http:; font-src 'self' data:

cli.description: Youwee - GUI for yt-dlp. Pass a video URL to queue or download it.
cli.longDescription: Youwee opens the desktop app and adds the given URL to the download queue. By default the download starts immediately; use --queue-only to only add it to the queue.

args.name: url
args.description: Video URL to download (alternative to the positional argument)

args.name: quality
args.description: Video quality: best, 8k, 4k, 2k, 1080, 720, 480, 360. For audio use 128 or auto.

args.name: output
args.description: Absolute output folder for this queued download

args.name: queue-only
args.description: Only add the URL to the queue without starting the download

args.name: target
args.description: Routing target: auto (default), youtube, or universal

args.name: skip-live
args.description: Skip live, scheduled, or was-live videos before downloading

args.name: playlist
args.description: Allow yt-dlp to download playlist URLs

args.name: no-playlist
args.description: Force single-video download for playlist URLs

args.name: subtitle-mode
args.description: Subtitle mode: off, auto, or manual

args.name: subtitle-format
args.description: Subtitle format: srt, vtt, or ass

args.name: embed-subs
args.description: Embed subtitles into the output file
